# Revenue Evidence

SMOKE SAMPLE evidence for local verification only. Replace before operational use.

## Period

- Reporting period: 2026-06-17 to 2026-06-23
- Compared period: prior 7 days

## Core Signals

- Occupancy: 68.4%, down 6.2 percentage points week over week.
- ADR: USD 142.30, down 3.8% week over week.
- RevPAR: USD 97.33, down 11.7% week over week.
- Room revenue: USD 145,860, down USD 18,900 week over week.
- F&B revenue: USD 42,350, up USD 3,200 week over week.
- Other revenue: USD 9,740, flat week over week.

## Notable Movements

- Positive changes: corporate negotiated segment held at 82 room nights, up 9.
- Negative changes: OTA transient pickup fell 21 room nights after two high-rate days.
- Channel or segment shifts: direct web conversion dropped from 3.8% to 2.9%.

## Evidence Notes

- Source file or system: sample weekly revenue export.
- Data owner: Revenue Manager.
- Open questions: confirm whether two citywide group leads moved to July.
